items.summary: In the backend trading loop (tradingLoop()), before placing new grid orders each cycle, fetch all currently open orders from the ICDex canister at 'jgxow-pqaaa-aaaar-qahaq-cai' and call cancelOrder() on each of them. This ensures no stale orders accumulate across cycles. Do not implement smart grid repositioning or order comparison logic in this step — cancel all open orders unconditionally before placing the new grid.
